selected_dialects.reason: Prismatic base plate 305x280x15mm with extrude_rectangle, corner holes, and center bearing boss — well within sketch_extrude_base typical parts (mounting plates, adapter plates).

Center bearing boss (diameter 40mm, inner bore 20mm, height 20mm) is a separate cylindrical feature that must be placed on the plate; composition enables placement and boolean union of the boss onto the base plate.

selected_domain_skills.reason: Rectangular plate with four-corner hole pattern and central cylindrical boss is a standard prismatic machining pattern covered by sketch_extrude operations.
